name: strudel-render
description: Headless Strudel → WAV render (also a parse/validate gate) for the ZeroClaw music bot. Run `npm install` once, then `node render.mjs '<code>' out.wav [seconds]`.
comment: @strudel/* pinned EXACTLY to 1.1.0 — 1.2.x imports SalatRepl from @kabelsalat/web and fails to load in node.
